wave-1.name: Named Gameplay Sheets and Portraits
wave-1.description: Align the 14 named character sheets and 14 matched portraits to Ultima VIII silhouette, contrast, and palette language.

wave-2.name: Tiles, Props, Animated Objects, and Crowd
wave-2.description: Refresh tiles, isometric tiles, props, animated objects, and crowd silhouettes with denser occlusion, clearer shadows, and Ultima VIII material treatment.

wave-3.name: Scene Backdrops
wave-3.description: Regenerate the base scenes and time-of-day variants after the gameplay art kit stabilizes, ensuring cinematic art shares the same palette and density logic.
